I completely understand your concern. To clarify: the reason it takes 12 minutes for a 12-minute song is because this app is **recording the video directly on your phone's screen** in high definition. 

When you use other websites, you are usually uploading your files to *their* server, their computer does the work, and you download it. In this app, for your privacy and to avoid server costs, **your phone is the studio**. 

The reason you got a 3-minute clip before was because the "Turbo" mode was on, but it actually sped up your audio too, making it sound like a chipmunk and cutting it short. To get your **full 12-minute video with perfect audio**, your phone has to play the song from start to finish while "filming" the canvas.

VocalCanvas is a professional, privacy-first web application designed to convert high-fidelity audio (MP3) and static images into high-definition (720p) video content. Unlike traditional converters that upload your data to a remote server, VocalCanvas performs 100% of the rendering locally on your device's hardware.

### **Technical Specifications & Architecture**

*   **App Name:** VocalCanvas
*   **Core Logic:** **1:1 Real-Time Mastering**. The app uses a "Session Recording" model. Because the conversion happens on your device to ensure privacy and perfect audio sync, the recording lasts exactly as long as the audio file (e.g., a 12-minute song takes 12 minutes to master).
*   **Frontend Stack:** React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
*   **The Mastering Engine:**
    *   **Web Audio API (`AudioContext`):** Routes the audio through a digital splitter. One signal goes to your speakers (monitoring), while the other is piped directly into the video encoder in a lossless loop.
    *   **HTML5 Canvas API:** Draws the background image at a native 1280x720 resolution at 30 frames per second.
    *   **MediaRecorder API:** Captures the synchronized stream of frames and audio pulses, wrapping them into a standard video container (MP4/WebM) that phones can recognize.
    *   **WakeLock API:** A critical mobile-first feature that prevents the phone from dimming or locking the screen while the 12-minute recording is in progress.
*   **UI/UX Design:** A "Clean Pro" aesthetic featuring a light slate-and-white theme with high-contrast blue accents. It includes real-time progress tracking, time counters, and a "Kill Switch" to prevent extra blank space at the end of videos.

### **Why it's better than standard converters:**
1.  **No Audio Distortion:** By recording at 1.0x speed, we avoid the "chipmunk" or "skipping" audio errors common in high-speed cloud renders.
2.  **Privacy:** Your images and songs never leave your phone.
3.  **Zero Cost:** No subscription or server fees because your phone provides the processing power.
